title: Asia Centric: How Leverage ETFs Are Shaking Up Asian Markets
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：杠杆 ETF 如何撼动亚洲市场
summary: The rise of single-stock ETFs, especially CSOP’s 2x leveraged SK Hynix ETF listed in Hong Kong, is reshaping market dynamics. The daily rebalancing of these massive funds is contributing to higher volatility in equity markets, creating new challenges for investors. At the same time, high concentration risk and narrow market leadership are fundamentally changing how investors think about hedging.

title: Google Poised to Lose Two More Senior AI Staffers to Anthropic
title_cn: 谷歌准备再向 Anthropic 流失两名高级 AI 员工
summary: Two leading artificial intelligence researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI.Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, both viewed internally as key contributors to Google’s Gemini AI model, are set to move to the Claude maker, said the people, who spoke on condition of anonymity as the information is not public.

title: NTT Raises $10.4 Billion in Largest Asian Bond Sale This Year
title_cn: NTT 在今年最大的亚洲债券发行中筹集了 104 亿美元
summary: Japanese telecom giant NTT Inc. raised $10.4 billion from a three-currency debt offering Wednesday, the largest global bond sale by an Asian company this year.

title: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡重新开放增加供应，布伦特石油抹去了战时收益
summary: Brent oil has erased all of its wartime gains after flows through the Strait of Hormuz ramped up following progress on a US-Iran peace deal.

title: Thailand Emerges as Southeast Asia’s Surprise AI Stock Winner
title_cn: 泰国成为东南亚人工智能股的意外赢家
summary: Thailand’s stock market is having the best year among Southeast Asian peers, as investors discover an unlikely source of exposure to the global artificial-intelligence boom.

title: Asia Stocks Jump With US Futures on Micron Outlook: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美光展望亚洲股市随美国期货上涨：市场总结
summary: Asian stocks rallied with US equity futures after Micron Technology Inc.’s blowout sales outlook reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: SK Hynix Surges 12% as US Listing Plan Boosts Valuation Hopes
title_cn: 赴美上市计划提振估值希望 SK 海力士股价飙升 12%
summary: SK Hynix Inc. shares surged after the memory chipmaker unveiled its plan for a $29 billion US listing, a move that analysts viewed as boosting valuations through capacity expansion and greater foreign investor access.

title: China Starts Marketing Record €5 Billion of Sovereign Bonds
title_cn: 中国发行50亿欧元主权债券创历史新高
summary: China kicked off marketing up to €5 billion ($5.7 billion) of sovereign bonds in what could be its largest-ever such deal in euros.

title: Korea’s Surging Equity Volatility Draws Meme-Stock Comparisons
title_cn: 韩国股市波动性飙升引发模因股票比较
summary: The volatility in South Korea’s benchmark equity index has become so extreme that investors and analysts are likening the market’s surging intra-day swings to the meme-stock frenzy.

title: Japan’s Household Assets Rise to ¥2,386 Trillion at End of March
title_cn: 3月底日本家庭资产增至2,386万亿日元
summary: Japan’s household assets rose 7.1% to ¥2,386 trillion ($14.7 trillion) at the end of March from a year earlier, the second highest level on record, according to the quarterly flow of funds report from the Bank of Japan.

title: Anthropic Says Alibaba ‘Illicitly’ Accessing AI Model
title_cn: Anthropic 称阿里巴巴“非法”访问人工智能模型
summary: Anthropic PBC accused Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. of waging a large-scale effort to “illicitly” access its Claude artificial intelligence model using thousands of fraudulent accounts. Bloomberg's Maggie Eastland has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Steadies Near $4,000 as Stronger Dollar, Rate Outlook Weigh
title_cn: 美元走强、利率前景承压，金价稳定在 4,000 美元附近
summary: Gold steadied near $4,000 an ounce after falling through the threshold for the first time since November, weighed down by a resurgent US dollar and the prospect of higher interest rates.

title: Philippine Bond Relief Rally Is Meeting Institutional Skepticism
title_cn: 菲律宾债券救济集会遭到机构怀疑
summary: Philippine bonds are staging emerging Asia’s biggest rebound following an interim US-Iran deal, but market watchers warn that inflation risks and a hawkish central bank may cap the bounce.

title: Bolsonaro Family Tension Rises as Michelle Criticizes Flávio
title_cn: 米歇尔批评弗拉维奥，博尔索纳罗家庭关系紧张
summary: Former First Lady Michelle Bolsonaro signaled she plans to remain on the sidelines of Flávio Bolsonaro’s presidential campaign after what she described as a disrespectful phone call with her stepson, exposing fresh tensions within the family at the center of Brazil’s right-wing opposition to President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.

title: Data Centers to Fuel Sharp Rise in Australia Power Demand
title_cn: 数据中心将推动澳大利亚电力需求急剧增长
summary: Power demand from data centers is poised to surge over the next quarter-century, adding to an almost doubling of electricity consumption across Australia’s main grid by 2050, according to the network operator’s latest road map.

title: Bain Capital Nears Deal for Stake in Volkswagen’s Everllence Unit
title_cn: 贝恩资本即将完成收购大众汽车 Everllence 部门的股权交易
summary: Bain Capital agreed to buy a controlling stake in Volkswagen AG’s heavy diesel engine unit, ending one of Europe’s most hotly contested private equity auctions.

title: Jinko Solar Eyes Breakeven This Year as China Moves to Ease Glut
title_cn: 随着中国缓解供应过剩，晶科太阳能今年将实现盈亏平衡
summary: Jinko Solar Co., one of the top five solar manufacturers in China, is looking to recoup expenses this year, as government measures alleviate the chronic overcapacity that has plunged the sector into more than two years of deep losses.

title: Japan’s LNG Stocks Seen to Benefit from Middle East Supply Risk
title_cn: 日本液化天然气库存有望受益于中东供应风险
summary: Japanese liquefied natural gas-related stocks stand to benefit from rebuilding war-damaged energy infrastructure in the Persian Gulf and the construction of new facilities elsewhere to diversify away from the Middle East.

title: Jamieson Wellness Explores Selling Itself, Taps BMO and Canaccord to Advise
title_cn: Jamieson Wellness 探索自我推销，聘请 BMO 和 Canaccord 提供建议
summary: Jamieson Wellness Inc., the Canadian vitamins and supplements maker, is working with Bank of Montreal and Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. to explore a sale, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Plastics Shortages to Keep Food Prices High After War Disruptions
title_cn: 塑料短缺导致战后食品价格居高不下
summary: Asian consumers will be facing higher grocery bills for months thanks to costly packaging stemming from the Iran war, which created severe shortages of plastics needed to get food from farms to market.

title: Women Find Foothold in Family Office Investing Landscape
title_cn: 女性在家族办公室投资领域找到立足点
summary:
Dawn Nordberg, head of integrated client solutions and global family office at Citi Wealth, said projections show that 55% of global wealth will be commanded by women by 2030 as the 'great wealth transfer' continues to trend toward women. 
Nordberg said that she is seeing a shift from women being the beneficiaries of a family to being the principal in a family office.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula Ally Leaves Senate Leadership Job Amid Ties to Bank Scandal
title_cn: 卢拉·艾利因银行丑闻辞去参议院领导职务
summary: The Brazilian Senate leader from President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s party stepped down from his post after a police investigation uncovered connections to failed lender Banco Master.

title: Builder Shares Rise Despite Trump’s Threat to Kill Housing Bill
title_cn: 尽管特朗普威胁废除住房法案，建筑商股价仍上涨
summary: Katie Hubbard, president of US capital markets for Walton Global, said that the higher end of the housing market is still doing well as high income clients are still paying to buy and build homes. Hubbard said that despite efforts to make home buying more affordable for the wide public, it is hard for federal efforts to increase housing supply to make an impact. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Justice Department Looking Into Gasoline Prices
title_cn: 特朗普表示司法部正在调查汽油价格
summary: US President Donald Trump said he has ordered the Department of Justice to look into gasoline prices, complaining that they aren’t falling fast enough.

title: Qualcomm Says Data Center Chips to Produce ‘Billions’ in ’27
title_cn: 高通称数据中心芯片将在 27 年生产“数十亿”
summary: Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh previews Micron earnings and the larger tech environment as companies at the forefront of AI forecast massive earnings. Singh said he finds similarities between the hold oil companies have on energy prices with how chip companies have a control of AI memory and are unlikely to increase that capacity as they bring in money.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Deal Between Cantor SPAC and Adam Back DAT Gets Delayed
title_cn: Cantor SPAC 和 Adam Back DAT 之间的加密交易被推迟
summary: A closely watched vote on a tie-up between a Cantor Fitzgerald-linked company and a digital-asset treasury firm led by Adam Back has been delayed.

title: Micron and Qualcomm Lift Chipmakers Amid Rapid AI Growth
title_cn: 美光和高通帮助芯片制造商应对人工智能的快速增长
summary: Shares of semiconductor stocks are soaring in extended trading on Wednesday, following a strong financial report from Micron Technology Inc. that underscored how artificial intelligence remains a major vector for growth.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: AI人材流出続く、米国上場を申請、首位返り咲き視野、「青天井」シナリオ、供給過剰の兆し

title: Basis Trade Fuels Hedge Funds’ US Bond Exposure: Fed Report
title_cn: 基差贸易刺激对冲基金的美国债券敞口：美联储报告
summary: Hedge funds’ growing exposure to Treasuries is primarily due to the revival of the cash-futures basis trade, according to a Federal Reserve economist.

title: Big Banks Pass Fed Stress Test, Quickly Boost Payouts
title_cn: 大银行通过美联储压力测试，迅速提高支出
summary: All of the biggest US banks cleared the Federal Reserve’s annual stress test, immediately allowing lenders to boost buybacks and dividends.

title: Redfin Chief Economist Sees Structural Issues in Housing
title_cn: Redfin 首席经济学家认为住房存在结构性问题
summary: Daryl Fairweather, Chief Economist at Redfin, discusses the bipartisan Road to Housing Act, which President Trump has opposed despite its passage by a veto-proof majority. The bill represents a significant federal effort to address the national housing supply shortage by tying federal funding to local governments' plans to increase housing supply and streamline zoning and permitting processes. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hertz Stock Drops a Record 41% on Profit Warning, Funding Plan
title_cn: 因盈利预警和融资计划，赫兹股价下跌 41%，创历史新高
summary: Hertz Global Holdings Inc. stock plunged the most since its initial public offering five years ago after the car renter warned of pressure on earnings and plans to issue new debt.

title: SK Hynix, Micron Solidify Memory Chips as Runaway Stars of AI
title_cn: SK 海力士、美光巩固内存芯片成为人工智能领域的明星
summary: With back-to-back announcements this week, SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. have solidified the memory chip market as the hottest part of the AI industry.

title: Japanese, South Korean Stocks Gain on Renewed Confidence in AI
title_cn: 日本、韩国股市因对人工智能重拾信心而上涨
summary: Japanese and South Korean equities climbed, led by gains in the tech sector after Micron Technology Inc.’s upbeat forecast reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade and brought relief to the market.

title: Canadian Defence Minister on Indo-Pacific Strategy
title_cn: 加拿大国防部长谈印度太平洋战略
summary: David McGuinty, Canadian Defence Minister, discusses his trip to Tokyo, where he met with his counterpart, Japanese Defence Minister Shinjirō Koizumi, to discuss cooperation and investment into the defense industry. He says the nation is planning to send more warships to the region, to increase presence in Japan, Korea and the Philippines. He speaks exclusively with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-WPP China Exec Sentenced to Life in $176 Million Bribery Case
title_cn: WPP 中国区前高管因 1.76 亿美元贿赂案被判终身监禁
summary: A former executive of WPP Plc, one of the world’s biggest advertising companies, has been sentenced to life in prison by a Chinese court for taking bribes totaling 1.2 billion yuan ($176 million) with his ex-colleagues, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Micron Soars After AI-Fueled Forecast Shatters Estimates
title_cn: 人工智能推动的预测打破预期后，美光股价飙升
summary: Micron Technology Inc., the largest US maker of computer memory chips, surged in late trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong.

title: Qualcomm Projects Data Center Sales of $15 Billion by 2029
title_cn: 高通预计到 2029 年数据中心销售额将达到 150 亿美元
summary: Qualcomm Inc., trying to expand its dominance from mobile phone chips, forecast sales of more than $15 billion a year by fiscal 2029 in the booming market for AI components in data centers.

title: Stocks Churn Before Micron’s Earnings as Oil Sinks | The Close 6/24/2026
title_cn: 随着石油价格的下跌，美光科技的盈利之前股市就出现了波动收盘价 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are HSBC US Head of International Wealth, Asset MGMT & Global Private Banking  Racquel Oden, Vanguard Investment Strategy Group Global Head of Capital Market Research Qian Wang, Morgan Health CEO Dan Mendelson, Novo Nordisk Executive Vice President, US Operations Jamey Millar, DoubleLine Capital Depot Chief Investment Officer Jeffrey Sherman, Wedbush Securities Equity Research Managing Director Matt Bryson, Deepwater Asset Management  Managing Partner Gene Munster, Redfin Chief Economist Daryl Fairweather, Tickitto Founder & CEO Dana Lattouf, & On Location President Paul Caine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DoubleLine’s Sherman: AI ‘Early’ in Tapping Bond Market
title_cn: DoubleLine 的谢尔曼：人工智能进入债券市场处于“早期”阶段
summary: Jeff Sherman, Deputy Chief Investment officer at DoubleLine Capital, joined the program to analyze recent developments in the U.S. Treasury market. The discussion focused on recent moves in Treasury yields, including a notable drop in the 10-year yield by 10 basis points to just above 4.3%. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Health CEO: Tech, GLP-1s, Labor Driving up Costs
title_cn: 摩根健康首席执行官：技术、GLP-1、劳动力推高了成本
summary: Dan Mendelson, CEO of Morgan Health, highlighted the disproportionate impact of rising health insurance costs on small businesses in the U.S., citing premium increases of 20-25% as a significant challenge. He explained that cost drivers include expensive new medical technologies like GLP-1 drugs and labor costs, which constitute about 70% of hospital expenses. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Forecast Shatters Estimates
title_cn: 美光预测超出预期
summary: Micron the largest US maker of computer memory chips, delivered a sales forecast that topped Wall Street estimates after AI-fueled shortages of the components sent prices soaring.  Bloomberg Intelligence Semiconductor Analyst Jake Silverman and Host of Bloomberg Tech Ed Ludlow react saying the earnings show Micron's pricing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron's Growth Rate Is Remarkable, Munster Says
title_cn: 蒙斯特表示，美光的增长率非常惊人
summary: Deepwater Asset Management Managing Partner Gene Munster breaks down Micron earnings on "Bloomberg The Close." He says hyperscalers will grow faster for longer than investors expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Sales Forecast Shatters Estimates on AI Demand
title_cn: 美光销售预测打破了对人工智能需求的预期
summary: Micron Technology Inc. delivered a sales forecast that topped Wall Street estimates after AI-fueled shortages of components sent prices soaring. Revenue is projected to be $50 billion for the fiscal fourth quarter. Earnings come in at $25.31. Matt Bryson of Wedbush Securities reacts.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet’s Dow Debut Shows Index Headache in Tech-Driven Economy
title_cn: Alphabet 在道琼斯指数的首次亮相表明科技驱动型经济中的指数头痛
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s addition to the Dow Jones Industrial Average marks another step in the benchmark’s effort to catch up with a market increasingly defined by Big Tech.

title: Focused on AI at the Enterprise Level: Ganguly
title_cn: 专注于企业级人工智能：Ganguly
summary: Raj Ganguly, co-founder and co-CEO of B Capital, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss how the use case for software is not going away and Ganguly's belief that enterprise services are the next wave AI growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras Plunges Below IPO Price on Disappointing Outlook
title_cn: Cerebras 因前景令人失望而跌破 IPO 价格
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares plunged to the lowest level since the chipmaker’s public debut after it issued an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors.

title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of ‘Illicitly’ Accessing AI Models
title_cn: Anthropic 指责阿里巴巴“非法”访问人工智能模型
summary: Anthropic PBC accused Chinese technology giant Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. of waging a large-scale effort to “illicitly” access its Claude artificial intelligence model using thousands of fraudulent accounts that undermine the US AI developer’s decision to keep its products out of China.

title: MGX’s $50B Raise Sets Up One of the Biggest AI Funds Ever
title_cn: MGX 筹集 500 亿美元，设立有史以来最大的人工智能基金之一
summary: Bloomberg's Jennifer Surane joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Abu Dhabi’s MGX has raised close to $50 billion from regional and global investors to accelerate spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and technology, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qualcomm Says Data Center Chips to Produce ‘Billions’ in ’27
title_cn: 高通称数据中心芯片将在 27 年生产“数十亿”
summary: Qualcomm Inc. said its expansion into chips for data centers will produce “billions” in revenue in the fiscal year that begins in October, suggesting the company is gaining a foothold in the booming market for AI gear.

title: HSBC's Oden Highlights Potential in Chip Sector Amid Market Volatility & AI Growth
title_cn: 汇丰银行的 Oden 强调在市场波动和人工智能增长的情况下芯片行业的潜力
summary: Racquel Oden, US Head of International Wealth, Asset Management, and Global Private Banking at HSBC, discussed the current market dynamics surrounding the chip sector, particularly focusing on Micron's influence. She emphasized the importance of maintaining a long-term investment perspective despite short-term volatility driven by fluctuating oil prices and uncertain interest rate directions signaled by the Federal Reserve chair. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Seeks $29B With US Listing to Fund AI Boom
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国上市寻求 29B 美元，为 AI 繁荣提供资金
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Jake Silverman joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals.SK Hynix is planning to raise $29.4 billion in a landmark US listing, as companies along the artificial intelligence supply chain rush to increase capacity to meet memory chip demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Deals 6/24/2026
title_cn: 彭博社优惠 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Veolia CEO Estelle Brachlianoff, Cohen Circle Co-Founder & Chair Betsy Cohen, Periscope Capital Portfolio Manager Christine McNerney, Mayer Brown Global Head, Capital Markets Group Anna Pinedo, and B Capital Co-Founder & Co-CEO Raj Ganguly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qualcomm to Buy Modular for $3.9B to Help AI Push
title_cn: 高通斥资 3.9B 美元收购 Modular 助力 AI 推动
summary: Bloomberg's Ryan Gould joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Qualcomm said it is acquiring Modular for about $3.9 billion in stock, adding artificial intelligence software capabilities that will aid its push into data centers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SPAC Deals Seen as Key Path to Public Market in Data Center Boom
title_cn: SPAC交易被视为数据中心繁荣时期进入公开市场的关键途径
summary: The rebound in blank-check companies is proving to be a useful route to public markets for companies involved in the artificial intelligence-data center build-out, said Betsy Cohen, a veteran of SPAC dealmaking.

title: Sony Pictures Invests $100 Million in Giant Screen Startup Cosm
title_cn: 索尼影业向巨幕初创公司 Cosm 投资 1 亿美元
summary: Sony Pictures Entertainment is investing $100 million in Cosm, an operator of large-screen theaters that show films and sporting events.

title: SpaceX Holder Andreessen Says Starship Opens Path to AI in Space
title_cn: SpaceX 持有者安德森表示，星际飞船开辟了太空人工智能之路
summary: Andreessen Horowitz LLC General Partner David George, an investor in SpaceX, said the “rapid reusability” of the new Starship rocket will be crucial to delivering on Elon Musk’s bet on orbital data centers to expand AI computing capacity.

title: OpenAI Unveils First Custom AI Chip With Broadcom | Bloomberg Tech 6/24/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 合作推出首款定制 AI 芯片 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow takes a look at OpenAI's first custom AI chip, called Jalapeno, developed in partnership with Broadcom. Plus, SK Hynix is planning to raise $29 billion in a landmark US listing. And, Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman weighs in on the company's first quarterly earnings since going public. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twitch Star Hasan Piker Notches a Win With NYC’s Socialists
title_cn: Twitch 明星哈桑·派克 (Hasan Piker) 赢得纽约市社会主义者的支持
summary: If Tuesday’s sweep by Democratic socialists across New York validated Mayor Zohran Mamdani as the city’s kingmaker, it also established controversial streamer Hasan Piker as an emerging power behind the throne.

title: Chile Senate Floor Backs Base Text of President Kast’s Mega Economic Bill
title_cn: 智利参议院支持卡斯特总统的大型经济法案的基本文本
summary: Chile’s Senate floor narrowly gave initial approval to President José Antonio Kast’s economic omnibus bill despite calls to delay the vote, setting up a tense next stage as lawmakers prepare for article-by-article debate.

title: Lockheed Wins $35 Billion US Deal to Boost Interceptor Output
title_cn: 洛克希德公司赢得 350 亿美元的美国订单以提高拦截机产量
summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. has been awarded a contract worth as much as $35 billion from the US Defense Department to quadruple production of missile-defense interceptors as part of a broader effort by the Trump administration to bolster munitions output.

title: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte on Oval Office Meeting | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/24/2026
title_cn: 北约秘书长马克·吕特在椭圆形办公室会议上|权力平衡：最新版 06/24/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, a Nevada Democrat and member of the Senate Banking and Finance Committees, reacts to President Trump's last-minute cancellation of a scheduled signing for a bipartisan housing bill as he pushes the SAVE America Act. NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte discusses his Oval Office meeting with President Trump, Ukraine’s progress in its war with Russia, Trump’s push to get NATO in “better shape,” and Europe’s efforts to take on more responsibility for its own defense. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Britain’s Gen Z Earning More Than Millennials in Early Stages of Career
title_cn: 英国 Z 世代在职业生涯早期的收入高于千禧一代
summary: Young Britons in Generation Z are earning more in the early stages of their careers than millennials did at the same age, according to analysis that may ease political fears of a so-called lost generation.

title: Australia’s Spy Chief Warns of Rising Terror, Cyber Threats
title_cn: 澳大利亚间谍头子警告恐怖和网络威胁不断上升
summary: Australia’s spy chief highlighted anti-semitic attacks such as the December massacre at Bondi Beach, a neo-Nazi bombing, cyber-threats by foreign governments and traditional espionage as just some of the security events his agency is trying to prevent.

title: Sen. Cortez Masto: SAVE Act Would 'Rig' Election
title_cn: 参议员科尔特斯·马斯托：储蓄法案将“操纵”选举
summary: Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, a Nevada Democrat and member of the Senate Banking and Finance Committees, reacts to President Trump's last-minute cancellation of a scheduled signing for a bipartisan housing bill as he pushes the SAVE America Act. She argues the SAVE America Act would disenfranchise voters and "rig" elections to the President's benefit. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rutte Says Trump Is Getting NATO Into 'Better Shape'
title_cn: 吕特称特朗普正在让北约进入“更好的状态”
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte discusses Europe’s efforts to take on more responsibility for its own defense and Ukraine’s progress in its war with Russia after his meeting with US President Donald Trump at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO’s Rutte Makes Hard Sell to Trump to Ease Iran Strains
title_cn: 北约秘书长吕特向特朗普强硬推销以缓解伊朗紧张局势
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte played to President Donald Trump’s love of praise and splashy visuals during a visit to Washington that was aimed at easing the US leader’s anger over alliance nations’ reluctance to help with the campaign against Iran.

title: Hormuz Fees Branded ‘Unacceptable’ by Trump in Warning to Iran
title_cn: 特朗普向伊朗发出警告，称霍尔木兹收费“不可接受”
summary: President Donald Trump said tolls on ships sailing in the Strait of Hormuz would be a red line issue for the US in negotiations with Iran.

title: Trump Calls London Mayor a 'Horror Show'
title_cn: 特朗普称伦敦市长是一场“恐怖秀”
summary: US President Donald Trump says Andy Burnham, who is set to become the next UK prime minister, appears to be "very liberal" and calls London Mayor Sadiq Khan "grossly incompetent" during remarks at a meeting with NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls As More Ships Pass Through Hormuz | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/24/2026
title_cn: 随着越来越多的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，石油价格下跌彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary:
Today, Laura Davison breaks down divides on both sides of the aisle as primary wins from the left puts NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani back in the spotlight and President Trump leverages power over Senate Republicans to pressure lawmakers into passing a voter ID act. Then, Mike Contopoulos, head of multi-asset macro investing at Janus Henderson Investors, weighs in on market reaction ahead of Micron earnings. Plus, Katie Hubbard, president of US capital markets for Walton Global, discussed the homebuying and homebuilding landscape after President Trump delayed signing a bill that would limit large investment firms from buying up single-family homes.
Finally, Ellen Wald, president of Transversal Consulting and senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, breaks down the oil market as WTI fell below $70 earlier in the day on ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Colombia’s Official Vote Tally Confirms De la Espriella Victory
title_cn: 哥伦比亚官方计票确认德拉埃斯普里埃拉获胜
summary: Colombian electoral authorities confirmed Abelardo de la Espriella as the winner of the nation’s presidential election after completing the legally-binding vote verification.

title: Trump Warns 'Big Trouble' for Oil Companies If Price Gouging
title_cn: 特朗普警告石油公司如果哄抬物价将面临“大麻烦”
summary: "The oil prices have come down so much, and we are not seeing anything at the pump by comparison to what it should be," President Donald Trump says during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY’s MTA Chief Rejects Trump Deal on Penn Station Renovation
title_cn: 纽约 MTA 局长拒绝特朗普关于宾夕法尼亚车站改造的协议
summary: The head of New York City’s transit system is standing by his decision not to sign an agreement on Penn Station’s $7 billion renovation, saying he doesn’t want to enter a deal with President Donald Trump without protections.

title: European Leaders Vow to Take NATO Burden as Trump Withdraws
title_cn: 特朗普退出后欧洲领导人誓言承担北约负担
summary: European leaders insisted they’re doing what US President Donald Trump wants: making NATO “more European.”

title: Trump Calls Likely Next UK Leader Burnham ‘Extremely Liberal’
title_cn: 特朗普称可能的下一任英国领导人伯纳姆“极其自由”
summary: President Donald Trump was dismissive of Andy Burnham, who is set to become the next UK prime minister, saying he was unfamiliar with him and has only heard that he is “extremely liberal.”

title: Trump Encounters GOP Summer of Discontent at Capitol Lunch
title_cn: 特朗普在国会午餐中遭遇共和党不满之夏
summary: From housing to Iran, congressional Republicans are losing patience with the president as they prepare to face voters in November

title: Far-Right Firebrand Pauline Hanson Rises in Australia After 30 Years on Fringes
title_cn: 极右翼煽动者宝琳·汉森 (Pauline Hanson) 在边缘人物 30 年后在澳大利亚崛起
summary: In 1996, a political outsider in Australia named Pauline Hanson staked her claim on the far right.

title: Labour Urges UK City Regulator to Probe Farage’s Crypto Lobbying
title_cn: 工党敦促英国城市监管机构调查 Farage 的加密货币游说行为
summary: The chair of the Labour Party has written to Britain’s top financial regulator, calling for an investigation into rival Reform UK over concerns that its leader Nigel Farage benefited wealthy donors when lobbying on cryptocurrencies and stablecoins.

title: Trump Scraps Housing Bill Signing | Balance of Power 6/24/2024
title_cn: 特朗普放弃签署住房法案|权力平衡 2024 年 6 月 24 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Republican Congressman Mike Lawler of New York, Burway Group Senior Advisor Roger Fisk, Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck Partner Rosemary Becchi and former US Ambassador to NATO Ivo Daalder. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Touts 'Well-Unified Party' After Clashing With Senate GOP
title_cn: 特朗普在与参议院共和党发生冲突后吹捧“团结良好的政党”
summary: President Trump touted a "well-unified party" after meeting Senate Republicans at the Capitol Wednesday. He reportedly squabbled with members after he scrapped plans to sign a bipartisan housing bill and lawmakers rebuked his handling of the war in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Team Looks at Treasury Breakup and BOE Reforms
title_cn: 伯纳姆团队研究财政部拆分和英国央行改革
summary: Influential figures in Andy Burnham’s entourage have urged the would-be prime minister to break up the Treasury to refocus the government’s agenda on growth.

title: Trump Touts Iran Progress as He Meets Senate GOP at Capitol
title_cn: 特朗普在国会大厦会见参议院共和党人时吹捧伊朗的进展
summary: President Trump said “the war is going very well” and that Iran is “making very big concessions” as he arrived at the Capitol Wednesday to meet with Senate Republicans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fight for Swing NY District Begins as Conley, Lawler Trade Jabs
title_cn: 康利、劳勒交易刺杀纽约区摇摆之战开始
summary: The two candidates who will square off this fall in a closely watched contest for a swing district in the New York suburbs traded jabs on Wednesday, previewing a battle that could determine control of the next Congress.

title: Adams Aide Charged, Ex-NYPD Officials Searched in FBI Probe
title_cn: 亚当斯助手被指控，前纽约警察局官员在联邦调查局调查中接受搜查
summary: Federal prosecutors in Brooklyn have charged Frank Carone, the former chief of staff to Mayor Eric Adams, his brother and two others in connection with an alleged bribery scheme as a long-running corruption scandal rumbles on months after Adams left office.

title: Trump, GOP Clash After President Scraps Housing Bill Signing
title_cn: 总统废除住房法案签署后，特朗普与共和党发生冲突
summary: Donald Trump and Republicans in the US Senate squabbled on Wednesday, as the president abruptly canceled plans to sign a bipartisan housing bill and lawmakers pressed him over his handling of the war in Iran.

title: Conservative Fujimori Poised to Win Peru’s Presidency, Vote Count Shows
title_cn: 计票显示保守派藤森有望赢得秘鲁总统职位
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori is poised to become Peru’s next president after running her fourth consecutive campaign, according to figures published by the elections regulator after weeks of adjudicating disputed ballots.

title: US Envoy to Italy Praises Meloni, Downplays Spat With Trump
title_cn: 美国驻意大利特使赞扬梅洛尼，淡化与特朗普的争执
summary: The US ambassador to Italy moved to further ease tensions between the two allies, saying relations are “fine” in the aftermath of a public clash between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump.
